# Daisy (The Daisy)

> Daisy is an AI-powered beauty and wellness platform that helps salons, spas, clinics, and beauty businesses grow through an AI receptionist, 360-degree customer acquisition (marketplace + cashback + marketing automation), and full white-label brand control. Available in English and Arabic with native GCC support.

## Product Facts

- **Website**: https://www.jointhedaisy.com
- **Type**: SaaS platform for beauty and wellness businesses
- **Languages**: English and Arabic (full RTL support)
- **Markets**: GCC (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar) and global
- **Pricing**: From $50/mo (Basic), $150/mo (Growth), $250/mo (Business) -- flat pricing, no per-staff fees
- **Free Trial**: 14 days
- **Key Differentiators**: AI receptionist, cashback loyalty system, white-label branding, bilingual Arabic/English

## Core Features (8 Categories)

1. Online Booking & Scheduling -- AI-powered appointment management with 24/7 availability
2. POS & Payments -- Integrated point of sale with no transaction fees
3. Client Management -- CRM with customer profiles, history, and preferences
4. Staff Management -- Employee scheduling, performance tracking, commissions
5. Marketing & CRM -- Automated campaigns, cashback rewards, customer acquisition
6. Inventory Management -- Stock tracking, low-stock alerts, supplier management
7. Reporting & Analytics -- AI-driven business insights and revenue analytics
8. AI Capabilities -- Voice receptionist, chatbot, smart scheduling, predictive analytics

## User Types

- **Business Owners**: Salon/spa/clinic owners seeking growth tools and business management
- **Professionals**: Beauty and wellness service providers managing their careers
- **Customers**: End users booking beauty services and earning cashback rewards

- [Payment Processing](https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/business/payment-processing): Integrated POS, invoicing, and financial management
